text: These scenes bring a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The glass-walled room feels bright and open, but also impersonal—a threshold into a world of ideas. Inside, the bold R+D display and digital screens evoke the promise of innovation, yet there’s a lingering tension between technology’s rapid advance and the human capacity to absorb its meaning. I feel contemplative, aware of how easily I become both observer and participant in the unfolding dialogue between humanity and its creations.
